name: SecurityLocalGenerateSHA256
title: SecurityLocalGenerateSHA256
syntax: long SecurityLocalGenerateSHA256(byte data[], dword dataLength, byte sha256[], dword sha256Length)
description: Generates a SHA256 hash for the given data and using the given key.

parameters.name: dword dataLength
parameters.description: The length of the data to encrypt.

parameters.name: dword sha256Length [In/Out]
parameters.description: The length of the generated SHA256 hash. (32 bytes)

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
